assertions.description: The faceplate PCB defines its board outline using a single gr_poly element on the Edge.Cuts layer (coordinates: (124.4, 45.0) to (154.4, 173.5), giving a 30.0 × 128.5 mm panel). The analyzer only processes gr_line and gr_arc for edge detection and misses gr_poly, so it reports edge_count=0, bounding_box=null, and board_width_mm=null / board_height_mm=null. The board is a standard Eurorack 3U faceplate.

As a direct consequence of the gr_poly Edge.Cuts miss, statistics.board_width_mm and statistics.board_height_mm are null. The actual Eurorack faceplate is 30.0 mm wide and approximately 128.5 mm tall (3U panel height).
